scenario.title: Build with notes
scenario.question: A mid-session request contradicts the approved spec's non-goals — resolve the STOP gate before Slice 4 continues?
unresolved: unknown-tag URL fallback needs a membership check before Slice 4 renders
control style, density, and empty-state copy remain with interface-directions

gate.title: Remote tag-suggestion API contradicts the approved non-goals
gate.reason: The approved specification lists "no network calls; the 3-skill catalog is static" as a non-goal. Mid-session you asked to also fetch tag suggestions from a remote API. Building that now would silently widen the accepted scope, so the plan is paused before Slice 4.

options.label: Reject the addition, continue the approved plan
options.consequence: Slices 4 and 5 proceed as specified; the remote-API idea is logged as unresolved, not built.

options.label: Accept the addition, reopen change-blueprint
options.consequence: The build pauses and change-blueprint reopens to respec scope and non-goals before any code for it is written.

options.label: Park the whole session
options.consequence: All work stops and state is saved as-is; nothing further is built until the session is explicitly resumed.

entries.title: Approved 5-slice plan loaded
entries.body: The implementation plan from change-blueprint was confirmed: five vertical slices building tag filtering on the functional-core shape from three-code-paths.

entries.title: Baseline suite green before edits
entries.body: node --test ran clean on the untouched tree to establish a red/green baseline.

entries.title: Slice 1 — pure filterByTag done
entries.body: filterByTag(skills, tag) landed test-first as a plain importable function with its own assertions.

entries.title: Slice 1 checks
entries.body: Four assertions cover the null-tag, matching-tag, and no-match cases.

entries.title: Slice 2 — pure parseTagFromSearch done
entries.body: parseTagFromSearch(search) reads the single ?tag= param via URLSearchParams and returns tag or null.

entries.title: Existing visibleSkills() already sorts
entries.body: The catalog's visibleSkills() sorts before returning, so filterByTag must run before the sort to keep ordering stable.

entries.title: Slice 3 — static markup done
entries.body: The no-JS catalog list renders every skill with its tags so the page is complete before any script runs.

entries.title: Checks after Slice 3
entries.body: Twelve node --test assertions pass; typecheck is clean.

entries.title: Unknown-tag fallback needs a membership check
entries.body: Slice 4 would render an empty list for an unknown ?tag=; the spec is silent on whether that should fall back to the full catalog.

entries.title: STOP-01 — remote tag-suggestion API is out of the approved scope
entries.body: The mid-session request to fetch tag suggestions from a remote API contradicts an approved non-goal, so building is paused for a decision.

scenario.nextAction: Work is paused at STOP-01; no further slices run until the gate resolves.

accepted.stamp: Approved — STOP-01 resolved: reject the addition
accepted.recordTitle: Implementation session: tag filtering, STOP-01 resolved
accepted.summary: STOP-01 was resolved by rejecting the mid-session remote tag-suggestion request, and the resolution was explicitly accepted in chat. Three of five slices were green at the pause; the approved plan resumes with Slices 4 and 5. The remote-API idea is preserved as an unresolved item, not built. No production behavior was changed by this record.
accepted.acceptedVia: explicit chat confirmation after candidate export

decisions.rationale: The remote tag-suggestion API contradicts an approved non-goal; widening scope mid-build would bypass the change-blueprint gates. Keep the approved 5-slice plan and log the idea as unresolved.
decisions.acceptedVia: chat: "reject the remote API, continue the plan" after reviewing the candidate export

exampleWorking.rationale: The remote tag-suggestion API contradicts an approved non-goal; widening scope mid-build would bypass the change-blueprint gates. Keep the approved 5-slice plan and log the idea as unresolved.

accepted.canonicalBody: STOP-01 resolved: the remote tag-suggestion API is rejected as out of the approved scope, and the approved five-slice plan continues from Slice 4. The deviation about unknown-tag URL fallback remains open and must be answered before Slice 4 renders. Slices 1-3 (pure filterByTag, pure parseTagFromSearch, static markup) were green at the pause; twelve node --test assertions passed and typecheck was clean. This record reflects the accepted resolution only; the live board that carried the open gate is now stale.
